user.title: Set up Proxmox Alerts
user.description: Create a webhook endpoint for a Proxmox VE or PBS instance. After setup, copy the generated webhook URL from the integration's device page into Proxmox under Datacenter → Notifications → Webhook.

data_description.name: A short label for this Proxmox instance (e.g. "Main Cluster", "Offsite PBS"). Multiple instances are supported.
data_description.source_type: Choose 'pve' for Proxmox VE or 'pbs' for Proxmox Backup Server.

abort.already_configured: An instance with this name and source type is already configured.

data_description.route_info_events: When off, info events are still received but no HA event is fired and entity state is not updated. Useful to suppress routine notifications without disabling the webhook.
data_description.log_raw_payloads: Useful for debugging payload format issues. Logs every raw payload to the HA log at info level.
